sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114868" key="xrusoe/liktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-έλικτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twined with gold,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Sil.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ambo</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">255</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
